headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

headline: Motorola: Waiting For More Evidence On $1.5 Billion Bet On Counter Drone Technology
summary: Motorola Solutions acquired D-Fend Solutions for $1.5 billion, targeting the counter drone market. Read more on MSI stock here.
